expectations.evidence: File daily_count.info.yml exists with name: 'Daily Count', type: module, core_version_requirement: ^10
hook_cron() uses State API to check 86400-second interval before running: ($request_time - $last_run) >= 86400
Uses \Drupal::state() to get/set 'daily_count.last_run' timestamp for interval tracking
Contains \Drupal::entityQuery('node') with conditions for type=article, status=1
